textByHashes.73acf91ff26bb345e015e940de4a8125e1f812f1: Hmph! What do I know about anything? I know nothing of you!
textByHashes.b4a304c23e1d3d680e67e1ccab2a494dcea30a49: Hmph! A simple man only knows simple truths, and what I know is my own business. I share that which is precious only to those who consider it valuable. Nothing will I share with those who are unknown to me.
textByHashes.3bd096bdcbec89e697c8d812f75eb0ec0de1295d: Hmph! I am a simple man, what little do I know? In esteem, must a man be held, before he feels his efforts are truly appreciated?
textByHashes.b3402ab17f5608072deeac348c8c17e4ca264d43: Hmph! People say things they do not mean - many times this has been true.
textByHashes.e2fb9588e6578231e3ce90402c4c3e5e066e218a: Hmph! Oh yes, what was it?
textByHashes.272e4874c62e59c1efdd8329443016f92fe599fd: Hmph! Nope, that's not me they're talking about, must be someone else.
textByHashes.71ae43eb172b1c5649d27cfc59dfa8088669356b: Hmph! Okay then, what was it?
textByHashes.2048f4158510973cd72819369b390314718f35c2: Hmph! Nope, doesn't sound like me, you sure you've not got me confused with someone else?
textByHashes.35d5854ef545b7a1e8c153b5be4c2690e58e49b9: Hmph! Yes indeed, what was the name?
textByHashes.1d9a802e85d3fc09d2f411ba0ec784d366042187: Hmph! A snitch! Are you trying to insult me? Get out! Go on!
textByHashes.a5731c9b4a39d3cf781e4d6804e7ecdaccf6c6d2: Hmph! So no one actually referred you to me at all then?
textByHashes.03a0a6244d2d436a74bf6748c0c4504c85e7485e: Hmph! So that's what they call me now is it?
textByHashes.fcd7e9accf2b921b4975dd7943ea0d9243133d08: Hmmm. Sage of Sanguinesti. Has a nice ring to it. Yes, that sounds like they were referring to me. What else did they say about me?
textByHashes.9ea0b33749ee207970c0c48646a17d7653c09328: Hmmmph. That depends. Did they hide themselves or did someone else hide them?
textByHashes.cda5a549555b68aa5a7fb619c6bf763ddfff35d1: Hmph. Myreque, eh? Well, it'll take a lot to find them. It's not an easy route up to sector three, but that's where they are. You'll need to follow the symbols in order to get there.
textByHashes.10d8e2c5a741199bb1a96b5d88cd3a035d76e077: And now you should leave. I have little tolerance for people and talking to you has tired me out.
textByHashes.d6276c2607237863caa5cc4fc82d6e66e79202af: Hmph, hmm, I suppose so, here you go.
textByHashes.497f5899aa9dbf5ea2a4a0a06f8b0f58826c0ec3: Hmph! Why? What do I know? I'm just an old man; what would anyone want with an old man?
textByHashes.dcb798b57467f79e163456bea100a5d3cdf9466c: Hmph! Who says I'm not lost, eh? Ever think of that, did you?
textByHashes.21609c7552084c73546737253665ee99ac55c2f2: In a rush to find out all the answers, not thinking for a second that someone else might be just as lost, if not more lost, than you! And what do you care about them, huh?
textByHashes.5bea2ec1c2c504fe5ffee8060c5403019ca3acd0: Hmph! Why should I know about the Myreque, eh? What use have they ever been to me, huh? I ask you!
textByHashes.1cbf0b81acdfbf956e2828741f7f143ddee744c1: Hmph! What makes you think that I can help you, eh? Do I look like a fountain of knowledge, eh? Do I?
textByHashes.d12d683fc9fd76525cffaab71f8e42cc8812cd75: Hmph! Yes of course, that's how to get to them. Follow the symbols.
textByHashes.e340674b86680f273f2b74cf2433a2c7aeaffe5a: The symbol of the Myreque - the silver sickle!
textByHashes.9e15ad67be024c38e3d1289742e805e1c0f318b8: Around and about; it should be an aid.
textByHashes.432bef246f8379d49731865bfdfb4b136271fa69: Hmph! Suppose they do. Stupid Myreque...
textByHashes.fcbb88bbfcccd75e3f7e953c1fec330bb0157312: Hmph! Yes of course, follow the symbols and all that. Pointless now though, they're right below us. Hmph!
textByHashes.da8e290eb8ce4f134b6954cad48bc02e47a2a241: Hmph! Dead! That's what I know about the Myreque. You're lucky to not be dead as well. Don't talk about them any more!
textByHashes.9a9ba6d6705cb51011736166f2c5038104d51fa5: Hmph! Yes of course, follow the symbols and all that. Pointless now though, they're all dead! Hmph!
textByHashes.67c46dbde02e00709f572fcee229986fa15cb948: Please make yourself some space, I have something for you.
textByHashes.b96217e59d82230d25ebf613d7d015d01bd77452: That doesn't look solved to me.
